debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : ℝ
hxge : x ≥ ↑n
hxlt : x < ↑n + 1
⊢ ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1)) ≤
    ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), (k + 1) / k)

proof:
norm_cast
        apply Finset.prod_le_prod
        · intros; exact Nat.zero_le _
        · intros k hk
          have h_k_pos : 0 < k := (Finset.mem_Icc.1 hk).1
          have h_pk_gt_2 : 2 < nth Nat.Prime k := by
            have : nth Nat.Prime 0 < nth Nat.Prime k := (Nat.nth_lt_nth Nat.infinite_setOf_prime).mpr h_k_pos
            have : 2 ≤ nth Nat.Prime 0 := (Nat.prime_nth_prime 0).two_le
            omega
          have h1 : nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) ≤ 1 := by
            rw [← Nat.lt_succ_iff, Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul]
            · omega
            · omega
          have h2 : 1 ≤ (k + 1) / k := by
            rw [Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le]
            · omega
            · omega
          exact h1.trans h2
successful_attempts:

        · intros k hk

            have : nth Nat.Prime 0 < nth Nat.Prime k := (Nat.nth_lt_nth Nat.infinite_setOf_prime).mpr h_k_pos
            have : 2 ≤ nth Nat.Prime 0 := (Nat.prime_nth_prime 0).two_le
            omega
          have h1 : nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) ≤ 1 := by
